content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against `master` and read the key iterative-minimal implementation paths end-to-end, including `src/shared/domain.rs`, `src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/{model,journal,service}.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/{mod,engine}.rs`, and the CLI/test coverage. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues that rise to a review finding. I also spot-checked the new coverage by running `cargo test iterative_minimal`, `cargo test --features test-stub workflow_engine_test::iterative_minimal`, and `cargo test --features test-stub workflow_engine_test::minimal_flow_remains_single_pass_without_iteration_events`, all of which passed.

## Amendments

None.
